mapper.sql: select a.achievement_id, a.title, a.content, a.file_url, a.teacher_id, a.college_id, a.status, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.del_flag, a.category, a.level, u.nick_name, d.dept_name as college_name, ar.audit_result as audit_result_label, ar.audit_opinion as audit_opinion_export, au.nick_name as auditor_name_export, ar.create_time as audit_time_export, ad.dept_name as auditor_college from edu_achievement a left join sys_user u on a.teacher_id = u.user_id left join sys_dept d on a.college_id = d.dept_id left join edu_audit_record ar on a.achievement_id = ar.achievement_id and ar.record_id = ( select max(record_id) from edu_audit_record where achievement_id = a.achievement_id ) left join sys_user au on ar.auditor_id = au.user_id left join sys_dept ad on au.dept_id = ad.dept_id
mapper.insert:
insert into edu_achievement
title, content, file_url, teacher_id, college_id, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag, category, level,
#{title}, #{content}, #{fileUrl}, #{teacherId}, #{collegeId}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{delFlag}, #{category}, #{level},
mapper.update: update edu_achievement set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where achievement_id = #{achievementId}

update edu_achievement set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where achievement_id in
#{achievementId}
mapper.select: select status as k, count(*) as v from edu_achievement where del_flag = '0' group by status
select category as k, count(*) as v from edu_achievement where del_flag = '0' group by category
select college_id as k, count(*) as v from edu_achievement where del_flag = '0' group by college_id
select count(*) from edu_achievement where del_flag = '0'
select status as k, count(*) as v from edu_achievement where del_flag = '0' and teacher_id = #{teacherId} group by status
select category as k, count(*) as v from edu_achievement where del_flag = '0' and teacher_id = #{teacherId} group by category
select count(*) from edu_achievement where del_flag = '0' and teacher_id = #{teacherId}
select count(*) from edu_achievement where del_flag = '0' and status = '2'
select count(*) from edu_achievement where del_flag = '0' and date(create_time) = curdate()
select count(*) from edu_achievement where del_flag = '0' and yearweek(create_time, 1) = yearweek(curdate(), 1)
select count(*) from edu_audit_record where audit_result = '1'
select count(*) from edu_audit_record where audit_result = '2'
